'''thafoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zabernism|zabernism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-f-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zabernism|zabernism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thafoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæfeyeth|thæfeyeth]] || [[word:thæfeyej|thæfeyej]] || [[word:thæfeyesh|thæfeyesh]] || [[word:thæfeye|thæfeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thafofoyoth|thafofoyoth]] || [[word:thafofoyoj|thafofoyoj]] || [[word:thafofoyosh|thafofoyosh]] || [[word:thafofoyo|thafofoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafoyoth|thafoyoth]] || [[word:thafoyoj|thafoyoj]] || [[word:thafoyosh|thafoyosh]] || [[word:thafoyo|thafoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafofyofth|thafofyofth]] || [[word:thafofyofj|thafofyofj]] || [[word:thafofyofsh|thafofyofsh]] || [[word:thafofyof|thafofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thafoyotho|thafoyotho]] || [[word:thafoyojo|thafoyojo]] || [[word:thafoyosho|thafoyosho]] || [[word:thafoyoko|thafoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thafoyoth|thafoyoth]] || [[word:thafoyoj|thafoyoj]] || [[word:thafoyosh|thafoyosh]] || [[word:thafoyo|thafoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thafoyothol|thafoyothol]] || [[word:thafoyojol|thafoyojol]] || [[word:thafoyoshol|thafoyoshol]] || [[word:thafoyokol|thafoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thafoyoothotho|thafoyoothotho]] || [[word:thafoyoojojo|thafoyoojojo]] || [[word:thafoyooshosho|thafoyooshosho]] || [[word:thafoyooko|thafoyooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thafoyothon|thafoyothon]] || [[word:thafoyojon|thafoyojon]] || [[word:thafoyoshon|thafoyoshon]] || [[word:thafoyokon|thafoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thafoyothooro|thafoyothooro]] || [[word:thafoyojooro|thafoyojooro]] || [[word:thafoyoshooro|thafoyoshooro]] || [[word:thafoyokooro|thafoyokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5bad82d}}
